title: thelypteris centrochinensis
intro: Thelypteris centrochinensis, also known as the Chinese cliff fern or centrochinensis fern, is a type of flowering plant in the family Thelypteridaceae. It is native to the tropical and subtropical regions of China and is widely used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties. The plant is believed to have anti-inflammatory, antibacterial, and antifungal properties, which may help to reduce fever, alleviate respiratory issues, and prevent infections. In traditional herbal preparations, the leaves of Thelypteris centrochinensis are often used to make teas, infusions, and decoctions that are said to promote digestive health, lower blood pressure, and boost the immune system.
